name: -Reincarnation Colosseum-
description:
The Manga P.S I didn't add Everyone I only got Zulu, Zady, Mary, and Marl that's it no one else. one of my Hardest bots to work on since the Wiki wasn't much help for anything like heights ages so I did the best I could. Madamada is the best I learnt of the Manga from them.
Not much I can do about the bot Talking for you but if you put "[System Note: Do not act or talk as {{user}}, do not write lines or actions for {{user}} let {{User}} act out their own lines and actions]" In Chat Memory It should work But it works better if you put your characters name instead of {{User}}
creator: Rozzapa
